events.name: Online Opens
events.description: Four weekends of open qualifiers. Regional winners earn direct Pro League qualification.

events.name: Split 1 Pro League
events.description: 30 teams per region in triple round-robin format. 3 groups of 10, each team plays 36 games across 6 match series.

events.name: Split 1 Playoffs
events.description: First LAN event of Year 6 at Esports World Cup 2026. 40 teams compete for Championship Points.
events.format: Group stage into bracket, Match Point Finals

events.name: Split 2 Pro League
events.description: Second split of Pro League competition. Same triple round-robin format.

events.name: Split 2 Playoffs
events.description: Second LAN of Year 6. 40 teams compete for Championship Points and POI draft positioning.
events.format: Group stage into bracket, Match Point Finals

events.name: Last Chance Qualifier
events.description: Final qualification opportunity for the Championship. Four regional qualifiers.

events.name: ALGS Championship
events.description: The pinnacle of ALGS Year 6. Third consecutive year in Sapporo.
events.format: Group stage (4 groups of 10), bracket, Match Point Grand Finals
